privileged_info_summary: Verified that the real USAID Supply Chain Shipment Pricing Data is downloaded via data.usaid.gov (a3rc-nmf6). The setup script dynamically extracts the top 15 vendors, and the verifier strictly checks for a new 'Scorecard' sheet and the precise formulas COUNTIF, SUMIF, AVERAGEIF, MAX, and RANK.
